flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at East Mississippi Community College fell 18% between 2006 and 2009 (25.2% → 20.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at East Mississippi Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.7k → $7.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at East Mississippi Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at East Mississippi Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (59.6% → 66.1%).
